requirement_topic.en: TBS/TZS EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (TZS IEC 55032)
requirement_topic.zh: TBS/TZS电磁兼容——辐射及传导骚扰（TZS IEC 55032）
requirement_topic.zht: TBS/TZS電磁相容——輻射及傳導騷擾（TZS IEC 55032）

summary.en: Multimedia and wireless equipment must comply with Tanzania Standard TZS IEC 55032 (adopting IEC 55032 / CISPR 32) for electromagnetic emissions limits. TBS (Tanzania Bureau of Standards) adopts IEC and ISO standards as TZS standards. Compliance must be assessed by a TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory. The TBS certification mark may be required for regulated electronics sold in Tanzania. Swahili labelling alongside English is increasingly expected on product documentation.
summary.zh: 多媒体及无线设备须符合坦桑尼亚标准TZS IEC 55032（采用IEC 55032 / CISPR 32）的电磁骚扰限值要求。坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）将IEC和ISO标准采纳为TZS标准。合规性须由TBS认可或国际认可实验室评定。对于在坦桑尼亚销售的受监管电子产品，可能需要TBS认证标志。产品文件上越来越需要斯瓦希里语和英语双语标注。
summary.zht: 多媒體及無線設備須符合坦桑尼亞標準TZS IEC 55032（採用IEC 55032 / CISPR 32）的電磁騷擾限值要求。坦桑尼亞標準局（TBS）將IEC和ISO標準採納為TZS標準。合規性須由TBS認可或國際認可實驗室評定。對於在坦桑尼亞銷售的受監管電子產品，可能需要TBS認證標誌。產品文件上越來越需要斯瓦希里語和英語雙語標注。

standards_or_laws: TZS IEC 55032 — Multimedia Equipment: Electromagnetic Emissions (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 55032 / CISPR 32)
Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) Certification Scheme

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 (adopting CISPR 32) covers EMC emissions for multimedia equipment. GB/T 9254 test reports are generated by China CNAS-accredited laboratories and support domestic CCC or self-declaration. These reports are not directly accepted by TBS but may serve as a technical baseline for TZS IEC 55032 testing, given that both standards adopt the same IEC 55032 / CISPR 32 base.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254（采用CISPR 32）涵盖多媒体设备的电磁骚扰。GB/T 9254测试报告由中国CNAS认可实验室出具，用于支持国内CCC或自我声明。这些报告不被TBS直接接受，但由于两项标准均采用相同的IEC 55032 / CISPR 32基础标准，可作为TZS IEC 55032测试的技术基准。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254（採用CISPR 32）涵蓋多媒體設備的電磁騷擾。GB/T 9254測試報告由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具，用於支持國內CCC或自我聲明。這些報告不被TBS直接接受，但由於兩項標準均採用相同的IEC 55032 / CISPR 32基礎標準，可作為TZS IEC 55032測試的技術基準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment: Radio Disturbance Characteristics (China, adopting CISPR 32)

gap.en: Tanzania requires compliance with TZS IEC 55032 assessed by a TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports are not directly accepted by TBS. Separate TZS IEC 55032 testing and TBS certification may be required for regulated product categories. Product documentation should include Swahili alongside English.
gap.zh: 坦桑尼亚要求由TBS认可或国际认可实验室评定的TZS IEC 55032合规性。中国GB/T 9254测试报告不被TBS直接接受。对于受监管产品类别，可能需要另行进行TZS IEC 55032测试并取得TBS认证。产品文件应同时提供斯瓦希里语和英语版本。
gap.zht: 坦桑尼亞要求由TBS認可或國際認可實驗室評定的TZS IEC 55032合規性。中國GB/T 9254測試報告不被TBS直接接受。對於受監管產品類別，可能需要另行進行TZS IEC 55032測試並取得TBS認證。產品文件應同時提供斯瓦希里語和英語版本。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TZS IEC 55032 EMC emissions compliance, assessed by a TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory, is required for multimedia and wireless equipment in Tanzania. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not directly accepted by TBS. Both Chinese and Tanzanian standards adopt IEC 55032 / CISPR 32, which may facilitate technical alignment but does not remove the need for separate Tanzania-market testing and certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚要求多媒体及无线设备符合TZS IEC 55032电磁兼容骚扰要求，须经TBS认可或国际认可实验室评定。中国GB/T 9254报告不被TBS直接接受。中坦两国标准均采用IEC 55032 / CISPR 32，可能有助于技术对接，但不免除坦桑尼亚市场单独测试和认证的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦桑尼亞要求多媒體及無線設備符合TZS IEC 55032電磁相容騷擾要求，須經TBS認可或國際認可實驗室評定。中國GB/T 9254報告不被TBS直接接受。中坦兩國標準均採用IEC 55032 / CISPR 32，可能有助於技術對接，但不免除坦桑尼亞市場單獨測試和認證的要求。

summary.en: Multimedia and wireless equipment must also meet immunity requirements under Tanzania Standard TZS IEC 55035 (adopting IEC 55035 / CISPR 35). This standard applies to immunity against electromagnetic disturbances for multimedia equipment including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices. Testing must be conducted at a TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory. Full EMC compliance in Tanzania requires both emissions (TZS IEC 55032) and immunity (TZS IEC 55035) to be addressed.
summary.zh: 多媒体及无线设备还须符合坦桑尼亚标准TZS IEC 55035（采用IEC 55035 / CISPR 35）的抗扰度要求。该标准适用于包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备在内的多媒体设备的抗电磁干扰能力。测试须在TBS认可或国际认可实验室进行。在坦桑尼亚实现完整电磁兼容合规，须同时满足骚扰（TZS IEC 55032）和抗扰度（TZS IEC 55035）要求。
summary.zht: 多媒體及無線設備還須符合坦桑尼亞標準TZS IEC 55035（採用IEC 55035 / CISPR 35）的抗擾度要求。該標準適用於包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置在內的多媒體設備的抗電磁干擾能力。測試須在TBS認可或國際認可實驗室進行。在坦桑尼亞實現完整電磁相容合規，須同時滿足騷擾（TZS IEC 55032）和抗擾度（TZS IEC 55035）要求。

standards_or_laws: TZS IEC 55035 — Multimedia Equipment: Electromagnetic Immunity (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 55035 / CISPR 35)

summary.en: China GB/T 17618 (adopting CISPR 35) addresses EMC immunity for multimedia equipment. Domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories support CCC or self-declaration processes. These are not directly recognised by TBS for Tanzania market access, though both standards adopt the same CISPR 35 base.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 17618（采用CISPR 35）针对多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度。来自CNAS认可实验室的国内测试报告支持CCC或自我声明流程，但不被TBS直接承认用于坦桑尼亚市场准入，尽管两项标准均采用相同的CISPR 35基础标准。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 17618（採用CISPR 35）針對多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度。來自CNAS認可實驗室的國內測試報告支持CCC或自我聲明流程，但不被TBS直接承認用於坦桑尼亞市場准入，儘管兩項標準均採用相同的CISPR 35基礎標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Information Technology Equipment: Immunity Characteristics (China, adopting CISPR 35)

gap.en: Separate TZS IEC 55035 immunity testing at a TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratory is required. Chinese GB/T 17618 test reports are not directly accepted for TBS certification. Both emissions (TZS IEC 55032) and immunity (TZS IEC 55035) must be addressed for full EMC compliance in Tanzania.
gap.zh: 须在TBS认可或国际认可实验室另行进行TZS IEC 55035抗扰度测试。中国GB/T 17618测试报告不被直接接受用于TBS认证。在坦桑尼亚实现完整电磁兼容合规，须同时满足骚扰（TZS IEC 55032）和抗扰度（TZS IEC 55035）要求。
gap.zht: 須在TBS認可或國際認可實驗室另行進行TZS IEC 55035抗擾度測試。中國GB/T 17618測試報告不被直接接受用於TBS認證。在坦桑尼亞實現完整電磁相容合規，須同時滿足騷擾（TZS IEC 55032）和抗擾度（TZS IEC 55035）要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TZS IEC 55035 immunity testing is required alongside TZS IEC 55032 emissions testing for full EMC compliance of multimedia and wireless equipment in Tanzania. Chinese GB/T 17618 reports are not directly recognised by TBS. Both Chinese and Tanzanian immunity standards adopt CISPR 35, which may facilitate technical alignment but does not remove the need for separate Tanzania-market certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在坦桑尼亚，多媒体及无线设备实现完整电磁兼容合规，须同时进行TZS IEC 55035抗扰度测试和TZS IEC 55032骚扰测试。中国GB/T 17618报告不被TBS直接承认。中坦两国抗扰度标准均采用CISPR 35，可能有助于技术对接，但不免除坦桑尼亚市场单独认证的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在坦桑尼亞，多媒體及無線設備實現完整電磁相容合規，須同時進行TZS IEC 55035抗擾度測試和TZS IEC 55032騷擾測試。中國GB/T 17618報告不被TBS直接承認。中坦兩國抗擾度標準均採用CISPR 35，可能有助於技術對接，但不免除坦桑尼亞市場單獨認證的要求。
